description: Performs storage provisioning, mounts, packages, permissions, and host configuration for RHEL 8/9

action_type.description: Task mode: 'create_storage' (sequential LVM flow), 'extend_lv' (LVM resize), or 'generic' (runs individual operations based on parameters)

lv_size.description: Size for creation or extension as String (e.g. '5G', '+2G', '100%FREE')

mount_path.description: Target mount point, directory, or file path (e.g. /var/tmp/test)

do_daemon_reload.description: If true, runs systemctl daemon-reload (generic mode)

add_fstab_entry.description: If true, adds /etc/fstab entry using vg_name, lv_name, mount_path, and fstype (generic mode)

hosts_entry.description: Host entry line to append to /etc/hosts (e.g. '192.168.1.50 server1.example.com')
